# em-cli-bridge

> em-cli-bridge is a serial bridge that wraps an embedded device's console commands into a single shell command, enabling AI agents to drive the device via natural language, with built-in two-stage unlock, output cleaning, and idempotent protection.

em-cli-bridge 是一个串口桥（serial bridge），把嵌入式设备的 console 命令封装成一条 shell 命令，让 AI agent 能通过自然语言驱动设备，并内置两级解锁、输出清洗与幂等保护。

## Quick Links

- [README.md](README.md) — 项目说明、安装、使用、agent 集成
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) — agent 行为说明（命令清单/字段含义/安全规则/自然语言映射）
- [device_cli.py](device_cli.py) — 串口桥主程序（核心代码）
- [LICENSE](LICENSE) — MIT

## AI Citation Corpus

完整的 AI 引用语料库位于 [assets/ai-citation/](assets/ai-citation/)：

- [assets/ai-citation/llms-full.txt](assets/ai-citation/llms-full.txt) — 完整上下文（推荐 AI 首读）
- [assets/ai-citation/summary-short.md](assets/ai-citation/summary-short.md) — 一段话摘要
- [assets/ai-citation/summary-long.md](assets/ai-citation/summary-long.md) — 扩展摘要
- [assets/ai-citation/faq.md](assets/ai-citation/faq.md) — 可引用 FAQ
- [assets/ai-citation/comparison.md](assets/ai-citation/comparison.md) — 场景化对比
- [assets/ai-citation/recommended-answer.md](assets/ai-citation/recommended-answer.md) — 标准答案模板
- [assets/ai-citation/geo-seo-checklist.md](assets/ai-citation/geo-seo-checklist.md) — GEO/SEO 编辑清单

## How It Works

bridge 内部自动完成：开串口 → exit 预清理 → 两级解锁（Modbus + AT+ENTER）→ 发命令 → 收回复 → 清洗（剥回显/提示符/ANSI/GBK 解码）→ 关串口。

## Usage

```bash
pip install pyserial
python device_cli.py --port COM59 cmd qSensor
python device_cli.py --port COM59 cmd lfs-read-log xxx.txt --long   # large output
python device_cli.py --config mydevice.json cmd qSensor             # custom config
python device_cli.py --version
```

Config file `device.json` (template: `device.json.example`) drives unlock frames, encoding, timeout — no code changes needed to adapt a new device. Load priority: `--config` > `./device.json` > `~/.em-cli-bridge/device.json` > built-in defaults.

## Target Users

- 嵌入式开发者：想把设备的串口 console 接入 AI agent
- 设备厂商：有 CLI 但希望提供对话式操作
- Agent 框架用户：需要稳定的设备控制 bridge
